sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى فَلْسَفَةُ الضِّيَافَةِ عِنْدَ العَرَبِ كَمَنْظُومَةٍ قِيَمِيَّةٍ رَاسِخَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Filozofija gostoprimstva kod Arapa očituje se kao duboko ukorijenjen sistem vrijednosti.
sentences.translationEn: The philosophy of hospitality among Arabs manifests as a deeply rooted value system.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَتَجَاوَزُ مَحْضَ التَّرْحِيبِ العَابِرِ لِتُصْبِحَ رُكْناً رَكِيناً فِي صَرْحِ الهُوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ona nadilazi puku prolaznu dobrodošlicu i postaje temeljni stub društvenog identiteta.
sentences.translationEn: It transcends mere fleeting welcome to become a foundational pillar in the edifice of social identity.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ نَشَأَتْ هَذِهِ السَّجِيَّةُ فِي رَحِمِ البَادِيَةِ القَاحِلَةِ وَالظُّرُوفِ القَاسِيَةِ، حَيْثُ كَانَ إِقْرَاءُ الضَّيْفِ مَسْأَلَةَ وُجُودٍ تَعْكِسُ التَّكَافُلَ الإِنْسَانِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Ova narav nastala je u njedrima sušne pustinje i surovih okolnosti, gdje je pružanje utočišta gostu bilo pitanje opstanka koje odražava ljudsku solidarnost.
sentences.translationEn: This innate disposition emerged from the womb of the arid desert and harsh conditions, where hosting a guest was a matter of survival reflecting human solidarity.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَقْتَصِرُ الكَرَمُ العَرَبِيُّ عَلَى بَذْلِ الطَّعَامِ وَالمَأْوَى فَحَسْبُ، بَلْ يَمْتَدُّ لِيَشْمَلَ بَشَاشَةَ الوَجْهِ وَطِيبَ المَعْشَرِ وَحُسْنَ اللِّقَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska velikodušnost nije ograničena samo na pružanje hrane i skloništa, već se proteže na vedrinu lica, ljubaznost i srdačan susret.
sentences.translationEn: Arab generosity is not confined solely to providing food and shelter; it extends to a cheerful countenance, kindness, and a warm reception.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا قِيلَ قَدِيماً فِي مَأْثُورِ القَوْلِ: "أَضْحَكُ لِلضَّيْفِ قَبْلَ إِنْزَالِ رَحْلِهِ".
sentences.translation: Kako se nekada govorilo: 'Smiješim se gostu i prije nego što odloži svoj prtljag'.
sentences.translationEn: As the ancient saying goes: 'I smile for the guest before he even unpacks his belongings.'

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الالتِزَامُ الأَخْلَاقِيُّ صَاغَهُ الشُّعَرَاءُ فِي مَلَاحِمِهِمْ وَأَشْعَارِهِمُ الخَالِدَةِ، فَجَعَلُوا مِنْ إِيقَادِ النَّارِ لَيْلًا رَمْزاً لِلْإِرْشَادِ وَالقِرَى لِكُلِّ سَائِرٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovu moralnu obavezu opjevali su pjesnici u svojim epovima, čineći paljenje vatre noću simbolom upute i gostoprimstva za svakog putnika.
sentences.translationEn: This moral commitment was crafted by poets in their epics, making the lighting of fires at night a symbol of guidance and hospitality for every wayfarer.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي العَصْرِ الحَدِيثِ، رَغْمَ صَخَبِ المَدَنِيَّةِ، مَا زَالَتِ المَجَالِسُ تَفُوحُ بِالقَهْوَةِ المُهَيَّلَةِ.
sentences.translation: U modernom dobu, uprkos gradskoj buci, arapska sijela i dalje mirišu na kafu s kardamomom.
sentences.translationEn: In the modern era, despite the clamor of urban life, Arabic gatherings still waft with the scent of cardamom coffee.

sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ القَهْوَةُ طَقْساً رَمْزِيّاً يُجَسِّدُ التَّقْدِيرَ وَالاحْتِرَامَ المُتَبَادَلَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Kafa se smatra simboličnim ritualom koji utjelovljuje uzajamno uvažavanje i poštovanje.
sentences.translationEn: Coffee is considered a symbolic ritual embodying mutual appreciation and respect.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ إِكْرَامَ الضَّيْفِ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ عَادَةٍ، بَلْ هُوَ فِعْلٌ حَضَارِيٌّ نَبِيلٌ.
sentences.translation: Čašćenje gosta nije samo naslijeđeni običaj, već plemenit civilizacijski čin.
sentences.translationEn: Honoring a guest is not merely an inherited custom, but a noble civilizational act.

sentences.arabic: يَظَلُّ البَيْتُ العَرَبِيُّ مَفْتُوحَ الأَبْوَابِ، مُحْتَفِياً بِالغَرِيبِ قَبْلَ القَرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski dom ostaje otvorenih vrata, slaveći stranca prije bliskog srodnika.
sentences.translationEn: The Arab home remains with open doors, celebrating the stranger before the kinsman.

sentences.arabic: هَكَذَا تَظَلُّ الضِّيَافَةُ نِبْرَاساً يُضِيءُ دُرُوبَ التَّوَاصُلِ بَيْنَ الثَّقَافَاتِ المُخْتَلِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tako gostoprimstvo ostaje svjetionik koji osvjetljava puteve kulturne komunikacije.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, hospitality remains a beacon illuminating the paths of cultural communication.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهَا لُغَةٌ صَامِتَةٌ تَفْهَمُهَا القُلُوبُ قَبْلَ العُقُولِ فِي كُلِّ زَمَانٍ.
sentences.translation: To je nijemi jezik koji srca razumiju prije razuma u svakom vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: It is a silent language understood by hearts before minds in every age.

sentences.arabic: وَتُؤَكِّدُ هَذِهِ القِيَمُ أَنَّ الإِنْسَانَ بِأَخْلَاقِهِ لَا بِمَتَاعِهِ الدُّنْيَوِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Ove vrijednosti potvrđuju da čovjeka određuje njegov moral, a ne materijalno bogatstvo.
sentences.translationEn: These values confirm that a person is defined by their ethics, not their worldly possessions.

sentences.arabic: فَالجُودُ بِالمَوْجُودِ غَايَةُ النُّبْلِ، وَإِغَاثَةُ المَلْهُوفِ ذُرْوَةُ المُرُوءَةِ.
sentences.translation: Velikodušnost onim što se ima vrhunac je plemenitosti, a pomoć nevoljniku vrhunac čojstva.
sentences.translationEn: Generosity with what one has is the ultimate nobility, and aiding the distressed is the peak of chivalry.

sentences.arabic: وَتَبْقَى الضِّيَافَةُ العَرَبِيَّةُ رِسَالَةَ سَلَامٍ وَمَحَبَّةٍ تُبْرِزُ أَصَالَةَ المَعْدِنِ.
sentences.translation: Arapsko gostoprimstvo ostaje poruka mira i ljubavi koja ističe izvornost karaktera.
sentences.translationEn: Arab hospitality remains a message of peace and love that highlights the authenticity of character.
